action: Generate one realistic AI video for each narration script using the genre's assigned avatar, and save each video's conversation ID (conv_id) with status set to pending.
fallback_action: If this action fails, ask the user what actions should be taken and relay the response to the StatusVerifier agent.

recipe.steps: Retrieve narration scripts with timestamps for each genre from memory using a structured key.
Retrieve the genre-to-avatar mapping from memory to identify which avatar to use for each script.

For each genre, call the AI video generation tool, passing the narration script and assigned avatar ID, to generate a realistic talking-head video. Record and collect the returned conv_id as the unique identifier.
Save each video entry—including conv_id, genre, avatar_id, script, and initial status as 'pending'—in memory under a structured key to track video processing.
